title: How much food are we wasting?
subtitle: How much food is wasted in the EU? The average amount of food waste generated per person by the EU in 2023 was 129 kg. Cyprus recorded the highest level, with 286 kg per capita, followed by Denmark (261 kg) and Greece (201 kg). Spain had the lowest figure, at 54 kg per person.
textNote: This map visualises the total amount of food waste generated by all the economic activities referenced in the Statistical Classification of Economic Activities in the European Community (NACE Rev. 2) in the European Union.
